summary: Test suite covers core happy paths (age filtering, size limits, keep-latest logic, dry-run flag) but lacks edge case rigor. Missing: empty artifact lists, parsing errors, invalid dates, zero/negative sizes, policy boundary conditions, overlapping rules, CLI integration tests, and error handling. Well-organized with clear naming and focused assertions, but test fixtures could be more reusable and there's unnecessary duplication. Would catch basic regressions but miss subtle bugs in edge cases and error paths.
